groups.label: France: Revolution to Empire
groups.explanation: Napoleon, the Bastille, Louis XVI, and Marie Antoinette are all tied to France's revolutionary and imperial history.

groups.label: Imperial Russia and Its Fall
groups.explanation: Peter the Great, the Romanovs, the Bolsheviks, and Rasputin are all tied to the history of Imperial Russia.

groups.label: Southeast Asian Nations
groups.explanation: Vietnam, Thailand, Cambodia, and Laos are all nations of Southeast Asia.

groups.label: Nordic Countries
groups.explanation: Sweden, Norway, Denmark, and Finland are all Nordic countries.
